name: Stuffed Boneless Cornish Hen W\port Orange Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the hens for stuffing by removing the skin from the backbone area and setting it aside.
2. Cut out the backbone, open the hen, and remove all bones except the drumsticks.
3. Boil the wild rice until tender, cool, and stuff the hens.
4. Close the hen with the drumsticks in the air and use the skin from the backbone to wrap the hen so it will stand breast side up in the baking pan.
5. Season the hens with salt and pepper.
6. Roast at 350°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
7. To prepare the sauce, combine orange juice, lemon juice, and brown sugar in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
8. Use cornstarch mixed with a little water to achieve the desired thickness.
9. Stir in the liqueur and keep warm.
